title: convolvulus breweraceus
intro: Convolvulus breweraceus, also known as the Bush Morning Glory, is a flowering plant native to Australia that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Convolvulus breweraceus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it has been used by some indigenous communities in Australia for its therapeutic properties.
